name: Acorn Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat egg whites until stiff.
2. Add baking powder and beat more.
3. Add sugar and vanilla; beat again.
4. Fold in crackers and pecans.
5. Put mixture in a buttered pie plate.
6. Bake at 300 degrees for 30 minutes.
7. Let cool and top with Cool Whip and chopped pecans.
